mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, plan_progress, mock_count, latest_mock_score, review_count, resume_updated_at, risk_flags_json, next_suggestion_json, create_time, update_time FROM career_loop_snapshot WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO career_loop_snapshot( session_id, plan_progress, mock_count, latest_mock_score, review_count, resume_updated_at, risk_flags_json, next_suggestion_json, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{sessionId}, #{planProgress}, #{mockCount}, #{latestMockScore}, #{reviewCount}, #{resumeUpdatedAt}, #{riskFlagsJson}, #{nextSuggestionJson}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE career_loop_snapshot SET plan_progress = #{planProgress}, mock_count = #{mockCount}, latest_mock_score = #{latestMockScore}, review_count = #{reviewCount}, resume_updated_at = #{resumeUpdatedAt}, risk_flags_json = #{riskFlagsJson}, next_suggestion_json = #{nextSuggestionJson}, update_time = NOW() WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
